description: Evaluate a cordon pricing scheme in the Bologna Acosta scenario by forcing route reassignment away from the busiest corridors. Using the scenario at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/run.sumocfg, identify the five standard edges (excluding internal edges) with the highest vehicle counts from a baseline simulation. Apply a travel time penalty to these edges using a weight file at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/pricing_weights.xml to generate alternative routes and perform a comparison simulation. Generate a report at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/pricing_report.txt consisting of exactly six lines. The first line must be the header 'EdgeID, BeforeVolume, AfterVolume', followed by five lines documenting each targeted edge and its vehicle counts from both the baseline and priced simulations, formatted as comma-separated values.
